scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.dev: npm run dev:tunnel && npm run dev:remote
scripts.dev:remote: mkdir -p logs && tsx src/server.ts 2>&1 | tee -a logs/dev-remote.log
scripts.dev:remote:watch: mkdir -p logs && tsx watch src/server.ts 2>&1 | tee -a logs/dev-remote.log
scripts.dev:tunnel: mkdir -p logs && source .env && zrok share public http://localhost:3000 --name-selection public:"$HOSTNAME" --headless 2>&1 | tee -a logs/dev-tunnel.log
scripts.dev:tunnel:watch: source .env && zrok share public http://localhost:3000 --name-selection public:"$HOSTNAME"
